items.prompt: plots ordered pairs and identifies plotted points accurately on a bounded coordinate plane
items.expected_evidence: plot ordered pairs and read plotted coordinates accurately
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves x-then-y order and plots or reads points correctly.

items.prompt: explains how axes, the origin, sign, and quadrant structure determine a point's location
items.expected_evidence: explain how sign and direction determine location in the four-quadrant plane
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains coordinate location using ordered-pair and sign structure.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to axis_order_reversal.
items.expected_evidence: identify x- and y-axis roles and use the origin as a reference point
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer reversed axis order or misread axis roles.

items.prompt: succeeds across plotted diagrams, tables, directional descriptions, and simple contextual maps
items.expected_evidence: connect tabular or directional descriptions to plotted points in bounded cases
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves coordinate meaning across multiple representations.
